title: CSS Transforms
description: Apply transform operations to create a set of cards that rotate, scale, and skew on interaction
html:
Rotated
Scaled
Skewed

validationRules.message: The rotate box should be rotated 15 degrees
The scale box should be scaled to 1.2x
The skew box should be skewed 10 degrees on X axis

hints.text: The transform property lets you rotate, scale, translate, and skew elements. Each function takes specific parameters.
Use 'transform: rotate(15deg)' for rotation, 'transform: scale(1.2)' for scaling, and 'transform: skewX(10deg)' for skewing.
.rotate { transform: rotate(15deg); } .scale { transform: scale(1.2); } .skew { transform: skewX(10deg); }
